description: Brand24 is a social listening and media monitoring platform that tracks online mentions, sentiment, reach, and related analytics for brands, products, competitors, and topics. It helps teams monitor conversations across social media, news, blogs, forums, reviews, and other online sources.
summary: Brand24 exposes a server-side REST API for account/project analytics data and an OAuth-protected MCP server for AI agents; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
